scripts.deploy: node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('index.source.html','index.html')" && vite build && node scripts/copy-static-pages.mjs && node -e "var f=require('fs');f.copyFileSync('dist/index.html','index.html');f.cpSync('dist/assets','assets',{recursive:true});if(f.existsSync('dist/prism_logo_01.png'))f.copyFileSync('dist/prism_logo_01.png','prism_logo_01.png');if(f.existsSync('dist/robots.txt'))f.copyFileSync('dist/robots.txt','robots.txt');if(f.existsSync('dist/sitemap.xml'))f.copyFileSync('dist/sitemap.xml','sitemap.xml');f.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});"
